subcodes.first_line: O Joseph! Thy letter hath indeed reached Us and been perused by the servant in attendance before the Throne. Verily thy Lord is the All-Knowing, the All-Informed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا یوسف قد حضر کتابک و قرئه العبد الحاضر لدی العرش ان ربک لهو العلیم الخبیر
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
